# feel-bridge — Wiki Home — Wiki Home

Open research into hybrid analog–analog reservoir computing, bridging GPU firmware physics and memristive neuron dynamics on FPGA. Accompanies the preprint: *Hybrid Analog–Analog Reservoir Computing: Bridging GPU Firmware Physics and Memristive Neuron Dynamics* (Zenodo DOI: [10.5281/zenodo.18880759](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18880759)).

> ☕ [Support NeuralMimicry on Crowdfunder](https://www.crowdfunder.co.uk/p/qr/aWggxwPW?utm_campaign=sharemodal&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=shortlink)

## About this repository

This repository contains the HDL source, simulation scripts, and supporting materials for the research paper. It is intended for researchers working at the intersection of neuromorphic hardware and reservoir computing.



## Related

- [aarnn_rust](https://github.com/neuralmimicry/aarnn_rust) — full neuromorphic platform
- [aarnn](https://github.com/neuralmimicry/aarnn) — C++ AARNN platform
